title: ChestplateElytra
description: Drop elytra and a chestplate above an anvil to merge them into one item. Drop the item above a grindstone to separate them again.
body:
Drop elytra and a chestplate above an anvil to merge them into one item. Drop the item above a grindstone to separate them again.

Enchantments are kept safely between merging and separating. Burning netherite armored elytra will keep the chestplate but burn off the elytra.
